Pennsylvania Emergency Management Agency
PA Emergency Management Agency
We’re here to make sure Pennsylvania is prepared for and can recover from emergencies and disasters.
For Emergency Managers
For Pennsylvanians
Overview
Monitoring and responding to changing conditions in Pennsylvania. Connecting county emergency managers with everything they need to prepare for, respond to, and recover from emergencies.
About Us →
Resources for Emergency Managers
School Safety
Emergency planning for safer learning spaces.
Floodplain Management
Better preparing communities for flooding.
Grants & Funding
Find funding and get help applying for it.
Power Plant Safety
Protecting Pennsylvanians near nuclear power plants.
Training & Exercises
Level up your emergency management skills.
Weather Resources
Prepare your communities for PA weather threats.
Ready Families Across PA
Know the common dangers in Pennsylvania and how to best prepare for them.
Ready PA
Here To Back You Up
Are you a county or state navigating an emergency? We can help. Submit a request!
Emergency Response
Mission Request
Get help with equipment and personnel.
Submit Mission Request
Incident Help
Get help managing emergency response.
Incident Help
Aquatic Rescue
Get help with aerial search and rescue.
Search & Rescue Help
Our Response Center
Where everyone comes together to manage emergencies in Pennsylvania.
Commonwealth Response Coordination Center
Recent Press Releases
Visit Our Newsroom
February 26, 2026
Shapiro Administration to Provide Resources After Hampton Hotel Fire in Easton
January 23, 2026
Shapiro Administration Encourages Pennsylvanians to Prepare for Snowstorm
December 22, 2025
Shapiro Administration Secures New Investments in Public Safety
December 10, 2025
Shapiro Administration Makes Investments in the Commonwealth’s 911 System
November 21, 2025
Pennsylvania Budget Invests in Public Safety & Disasater Response  |  PEMA Newsroom
November 20, 2025
Shapiro Administration Promotes Home Preparedness Ahead of the Thanksgiving
September 25, 2025
Shapiro Administration Urges Pennsylvanians to Protect Their Finances, Be Prepared Before a Disaster or Emergency Strikes
911 Program
Processing 14.5 million requests for emergency help every year.
911 Program
Reducing Risk
We're working to reduce and eliminate the effects of disasters in Pennsylvania.
Reducing Risk
Submit A Report
Report hazardous materials spills, storm damage, and more.
Submit A Report
Keeping Pennsylvanians safe and prepared. Led by Director Randy Padfield.

Pennsylvania Emergency Management Agency
PA Emergency Management Agency
We’re here to make sure Pennsylvania is prepared for and can recover from emergencies and disasters.
For Emergency Managers
For Pennsylvanians
Overview
Monitoring and responding to changing conditions in Pennsylvania. Connecting county emergency managers with everything they need to prepare for, respond to, and recover from emergencies.
About Us →
Resources for Emergency Managers
School Safety
Emergency planning for safer learning spaces.
Floodplain Management
Better preparing communities for flooding.
Grants & Funding
Find funding and get help applying for it.
Power Plant Safety
Protecting Pennsylvanians near nuclear power plants.
Training & Exercises
Level up your emergency management skills.
Weather Resources
Prepare your communities for PA weather threats.
Ready Families Across PA
Know the common dangers in Pennsylvania and how to best prepare for them.
Ready PA
Here To Back You Up
Are you a county or state navigating an emergency? We can help. Submit a request!
Emergency Response
Mission Request
Get help with equipment and personnel.
Submit Mission Request
Incident Help
Get help managing emergency response.
Incident Help
Aquatic Rescue
Get help with aerial search and rescue.
Search & Rescue Help
Our Response Center
Where everyone comes together to manage emergencies in Pennsylvania.
Commonwealth Response Coordination Center

PA Emergency Management Agency
We’re here to make sure Pennsylvania is prepared for and can recover from emergencies and disasters.
For Emergency Managers
For Pennsylvanians
Overview
Monitoring and responding to changing conditions in Pennsylvania. Connecting county emergency managers with everything they need to prepare for, respond to, and recover from emergencies.
About Us →
Resources for Emergency Managers
School Safety
Emergency planning for safer learning spaces.
Floodplain Management
Better preparing communities for flooding.
Grants & Funding
Find funding and get help applying for it.
Power Plant Safety
Protecting Pennsylvanians near nuclear power plants.
Training & Exercises
Level up your emergency management skills.
Weather Resources
Prepare your communities for PA weather threats.
Ready Families Across PA
Know the common dangers in Pennsylvania and how to best prepare for them.
Ready PA
Here To Back You Up
Are you a county or state navigating an emergency? We can help. Submit a request!
Emergency Response
Mission Request
Get help with equipment and personnel.
Submit Mission Request
Incident Help
Get help managing emergency response.
Incident Help
Aquatic Rescue
Get help with aerial search and rescue.
Search & Rescue Help
Our Response Center
Where everyone comes together to manage emergencies in Pennsylvania.
Commonwealth Response Coordination Center

911 Program
Processing 14.5 million requests for emergency help every year.
911 Program

We're working to reduce and eliminate the effects of disasters in Pennsylvania.
Reducing Risk

Submit A Report
Keeping Pennsylvanians safe and prepared. Led by Director Randy Padfield.

Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. Commonwealth of Pennsylvania government websites and email systems use "pennsylvania.gov" or "pa.gov" at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you're on an official state website.

Pennsylvania Emergency Management Agency
PA Emergency Management Agency
We’re here to make sure Pennsylvania is prepared for and can recover from emergencies and disasters.
For Emergency Managers
For Pennsylvanians
Overview
Monitoring and responding to changing conditions in Pennsylvania. Connecting county emergency managers with everything they need to prepare for, respond to, and recover from emergencies.
About Us →
Resources for Emergency Managers
School Safety
Emergency planning for safer learning spaces.
Floodplain Management
Better preparing communities for flooding.
Grants & Funding
Find funding and get help applying for it.
Power Plant Safety
Protecting Pennsylvanians near nuclear power plants.
Training & Exercises
Level up your emergency management skills.
Weather Resources
Prepare your communities for PA weather threats.
Ready Families Across PA
Know the common dangers in Pennsylvania and how to best prepare for them.
Ready PA
Here To Back You Up
Are you a county or state navigating an emergency? We can help. Submit a request!
Emergency Response
Mission Request
Get help with equipment and personnel.
Submit Mission Request
Incident Help
Get help managing emergency response.
Incident Help
Aquatic Rescue
Get help with aerial search and rescue.
Search & Rescue Help

Where everyone comes together to manage emergencies in Pennsylvania.
